name: Rhino Horn
description: A series of quick, forward-moving kicks. Effective at sending the opponent flying back and into the corner.

name: Scratch Wheel
description: A powerful rising kick. It is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack.

name: Lynx Song
description: A spinning rush forward that can be followed up by one of four different techniques.

name: Leopard Snap
description: (During Lynx Song)A long reaching attack performed from Lynx Song. When boosted, the number of hits increase and it cannot be counterattacked when blocked

name: Harvest Circle
description: (During Lynx Song)A launching kick performed from Lynx Song. When boosted, the number of hits increase and you have more time to perform a follow-up attack.

name: Mallet Smash
description: (During Lynx Song)An overhead strike performed from Lynx Song that cannot be blocked while crouching. When boosted, it allows you to move before your opponent even when blocked.

name: Lynx Whirl
description: (During Lynx Song)An additional spin to extend Lynx Song. A Leopard Snap, Harvest Circle, or Mallet Smash performed from this technique will be boosted.

name: Spinning Scythe
description: A series of spinning kicks, the second of which can transition into another technique on hit. Closing combos with this allows you to continue your offense or aim for follow-up attacks.

name: Lynx Whirl
description: (During Spinning Scythe)A spin performed from Spinning Scythe. A Leopard Snap, Harvest Circle, or Mallet Smash performed from this technique will be boosted.

name: Moon Glider
description: A technique that steps back before performing a vertical spinning kick. Allows you to avoid attacks and then blow away opponents with the follow-up.

name: Meteor Volley
description: Leap diagonally into the air with a series of powerful rising kicks. It's invincible against jumping attacks and allows for follow-up attacks on hit.

name: Revival Dance
description: (Holdto change effect)Launch forward with a leaping attack followed by a wild flurry of kicks. After landing the first hit, hold down during the attack to restore vitality.

name: Song of the Grasslands
description: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)Launch the opponent into the air, then deliver a series of nature-powered kicks. It has invincibility at the beginning, making it useful as an anti-air, or as a way to turn the tables on your opponent.

name: Slide
description: Slide toward your opponent. This is a low attack that cannot be blocked standing.

name: Round Arch
description: Retreat back and attack while avoiding low attacks.

name: Starling Beak
description: A long-reaching series of attacks that can be canceled into special moves

name: Handstand Whip
description: A two-hit combination attack, the first of which cannot be blocked crouching.

name: Hind Kick
description: A quick series of attacks that can be canceled into special moves.

name: Fluttering Lark
description: An attack consisting of multiple hits, the first of which cannot be blocked while standing.

name: Turning Tail
description: A series of attacks that allow for follow-up attacks on hit.

name: Trunk Slap
description: A multi-hit attack with a lenient input window for follow-ups.

name: Soaring Raid
description: (During a jump)A jumping attack that can hit a grounded opponent multiple times.

name: Raptor Range
description: (During a jump)A combination of attacks that is useful against jumping opponents.

name: Leg Tackle
description: (When near opponent)Grab your opponent with your legs to bring them down. Throws your opponent without switching places with them.

name: Leg Lift Throw
description: (When near opponent)Grab your opponent and flip them over and back. Throws your opponent while switching places with them.

name: Drive Impact: Giraffe Neck
description: Lunge forward with a powerful attack. Can be used to absorb an opponent's attack while launching your own offensive.

name: Drive Reversal: Boar Charge
description: (When blocking, recovering from a knockdown, or during a successful Drive Parry)Can be used after blocking an attack to quickly turn a defensive position into an offensive one. Can also be used when recovering from a knockdown. The input can be held while downed to perform this when rising

name: Drive Parry
description: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)Adopt a stance that allows you to deflect all opponent strikes. This stance can be sustained by holding down the command used to activate it.

name: Parry Drive Rush
description: (During a Drive Parry)Immediately move forward from a Drive Parry stance. Normal or unique attacks performed while moving will have their properties changed.

name: Cancel Drive Rush
description: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)Lunge forward with a powerful attack. Can be used to absorb an opponent's attack while launching your own offensive.
